history.text:
[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: An image shows a red, dark-themed background with a centered profile icon and several lines of text.

Main Subject:
At the center is a circular, light-gray user/profile placeholder icon with a small inner circular head shape and two smaller semicircle shoulder shapes, outlined by a thin red ring.

Setting:
The background is a dark red graphic collage with layered, blurred shapes resembling abstract illustrations, including large circular forms on the left and various leaf-like or flame-like lines and curves across the rest of the image. The overall look is like a title or profile screen, with no clear physical location shown.

Visual Details:
The color palette is primarily deep red and dark maroon, with lighter red and gray elements. The icon is positioned in the upper center of the text block. Below it, large bold red text reads “SELAMAT JALAN.” Under that, a smaller white line reads “Sampai Jumpa Kembali.” A further smaller gray line reads “Kayz x Hutoa II Assisten [1].” Near the bottom center, a red rounded pill-shaped button or label contains the text “61 Left.” A faint grid-like overlay and subtle diagonal/curved decorative lines are visible across the entire background. The camera view appears flat and centered, like a graphic design layout.

Visible Text:
SELAMAT JALAN
Sampai Jumpa Kembali
Kayz x Hutoa II Assisten [1]
61 Left

Practical Summary:
The image is a centered graphic screen with a placeholder profile icon and multiple lines of text. It includes a red rounded label indicating “61 Left” over a dark red abstract background.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
